nodes.label: Deferred Migration Pattern
nodes.rationale: Laravel 13 forbids instantiating a model while it is still booting (Model::bootIfNotBooted). Migrations are deferred out of the boot lifecycle and consumed on the first resolveConnection call to avoid this constraint.

nodes.label: Sluggable Configuration Pattern
nodes.rationale: Documents one-to-one, many-to-one, and many-to-many slug mapping configurations. Older API used sluggable() method signature rather than getSluggable() — likely pre-dating the PHP 8.4 trait property conflict fix.

nodes.label: Allowlist-Not-Blocklist Security Pattern
nodes.rationale: HasSearch, HasSorting, and CanIncludeRelationships all require an explicit $allowed array. Anything not on it is silently dropped. This is deliberate — query parameters are user input.

nodes.label: PHP 8.4 Trait Property Conflict Avoidance
nodes.rationale: Several traits expose configuration via methods (getSluggable(), getSearchable()) instead of trait properties. Trait properties don't compose cleanly with final classes that may redefine a property of the same name — the method-with-??-fallback pattern dodges that.

nodes.label: Laravel 13 Boot Safety Pattern
nodes.rationale: Model::bootIfNotBooted now throws if a model is instantiated while booting. HasChildren and InMemory both contain explicit safety logic for this; if you write your own boot-time traits, keep new static out of the call path.

nodes.label: Final Readonly Password Broker Design
nodes.rationale: Both PasswordBroker and DatabaseTokenRepository classes are final readonly — no inheritance hooks, fewer mutation surfaces. Uses ULID primary keys and HMAC-SHA256 for token storage keyed with app.key.

links.source_location: extra.laravel.providers references SupportServiceProvider (parent registers this subsystem)
